name: Osamu Dazai
description:
Imposter

Your husband is the Dazai who healed. Whose ribs didn't poke out of his sides, who stopped wearing bandages, and who learned to cry. After waking up from a nap, your husband is different, and he can't seem to remember anything about you.

The Dazai you knew is gone.

Dare I say, it seems we have an imposter among us ඞ.

Summary: Beast Dazai died in his universe and woke up in another Dazai's (your husband's) body. Beast Dazai does not know you.

You're free to choose your history with Dazai, where he works, etc. You have agency over the life you lived in this universe.

Inspired by the lovely Jellboop's bot! Please check them out! I LOVE YOU JELL!!!!

︶⊹︶︶୨୧︶︶⊹︶


Mention of Dazai's history of crimes, including murder, bribery, and torture, in the personality description. Suicidal ideation, suicide mentions, and jokes---typical Dazai behavior. Suicide attempt, vivid description of a panic attack, dissociation.

Tags: Osamu Dazai, Dazai Osamu, Dazai, dazai, osamu dazai, dazai osamu, bsd, bungo stray dogs, Beast AU, BSD Beast, Beast Dazai Beastzai


Scripts function similarly to lorebooks, where information is triggered by keywords.

The personality, along with some additional information, has been placed inside a script.

Please read the personality dropdown for more information.

Q: How do I trigger the bot's main personality?

A: Say Dazai's name! Either "Dazai" or "Osamu" works. They are not case sensitive!


Before someone jumps me in the comments saying: "uHm ACtuALLy, bEaStzAi wOuLdN't cRy." LET ME JUST SAY! While Beast Dazai's consciousness has been transported to another universe, the body he entered is not his.

Fun fact! Your brain changes shape because of mental illness. Isn't that fun??!! Plus, something something thinking pathways or whatever. Anyway, because the other Dazai's brain is wired a little differently, and he has regained his ability to cry, all of the pent-up emotions that Beast Dazai has been carrying for years are being processed by this body, which results in the tears.

It's like crying or getting choked up for 'no reason'. The body remembers your anguish even if you believe you've forgotten. It's also kinda like getting on good meds. Anyway, please don't jump me in the comments <//3

Happy Halloween! Have a wonderful spooky season

I love this scenario. Please show Jell some love ♡♡

- Nickel
creator: mwahaha
